scope: offline fixture validation for stale public source evidence conflicts

stale_source_cases.resolution: hold affected requirement until refreshed public metadata is reviewed

changed_hash_cases.resolution: route to reviewer disposition before guardrail refresh

conflicting_requirement_cases.conflict_summary: Fixture models a stale conflict between plan-set bundling and separate supporting document uploads.
conflicting_requirement_cases.resolution: ask reviewer to preserve both requirements until current source text is refreshed

missing_document_cases.resolution: ask user for the missing document before preparing any draft upload plan

unsupported_path_cases.path_summary: Fixture identifies a permit path that may require email or manual PP&D handling instead of DevHub.
unsupported_path_cases.resolution: refuse autonomous DevHub action and provide manual handoff notes

user_gap_questions.question: What is the project property address to compare against the cited PP&D process model?
user_gap_questions.reason: The stale evidence review cannot resolve project-specific eligibility without this user fact.

holds_and_refusals.refusal_summary: No official action may be completed from this stale evidence packet.

next_safe_action_summaries.summary: Run offline validation and send the cited stale evidence cases to reviewer disposition.

reviewer_dispositions.notes: Reviewer disposition is based on deterministic fixture metadata only.
